My work ethic and the example set by my parents, who always prioritized stability and responsibility, have influenced me to approach tasks with a sense of structure and foresight. While I may occasionally find myself working late or needing to adjust my schedule, I generally aim to complete tasks ahead of time to avoid unnecessary stress.
